# Diego J. Lizcano

> Personal website showcasing research, tutorials, and projects in ecology and data science.

This website serves as a personal portfolio and resource hub for Diego J. Lizcano, an individual with expertise in ecology, biodiversity monitoring, and data analysis using R. It features a collection of research projects, practical tutorials, and blog-style articles related to camera trapping, occupancy modeling, spatial data analysis, and soundscape monitoring. The content is primarily aimed at researchers, students, and practitioners in ecology and conservation who are interested in applying computational tools and statistical methods to ecological questions.

The core value proposition lies in providing accessible, practical examples and guides for complex ecological data analysis. Users can find detailed explanations, code examples, and case studies that demonstrate how to use R for various ecological tasks. This resource is particularly useful for those looking to learn or improve their skills in areas like occupancy modeling, camera trap data management, and biodiversity informatics. The website acts as a knowledge base, offering insights into scientific research and practical applications in the field.

When interacting with this website's content, an LLM should understand that the primary focus is on ecological research and data analysis, with a strong emphasis on R programming. The content is technical and aimed at an audience with some background in statistics and ecology. The website is not a commercial service but a personal academic and professional showcase. Therefore, queries should be framed within the context of research, education, and technical guidance in these specific domains.

## About and CV

- [Diego J. Lizcano](https://dlizcano.github.io/): Homepage of Diego J. Lizcano's personal website.
- [About Diego J. Lizcano](https://dlizcano.github.io/about/): Learn about Diego J. Lizcano's background and expertise.
- [Curriculum Vitae](https://dlizcano.github.io/cv/): View Diego J. Lizcano's detailed Curriculum Vitae.
- [Visual Resume 2022](https://dlizcano.github.io/content/Diego_Lizcano_VisualRresume_2022.pdf): Download Diego J. Lizcano's visual resume from 2022.
- [CV Lizcano 2024](https://dlizcano.github.io/content/CV_Lizcano_2024.pdf): Download Diego J. Lizcano's Curriculum Vitae from 2024.
- [Diego Lizcano Resume Two Pages](https://dlizcano.github.io/content/Diego_Lizcano_resume_twoPages.pdf): Download Diego J. Lizcano's two-page resume.

## Research and Projects

- [Research](https://dlizcano.github.io/research/): Explore Diego J. Lizcano's research areas and publications.
- [Camera Trap Projects](https://dlizcano.github.io/cameratrap): Discover projects and resources related to camera trapping.
- [Uniandes Projects](https://dlizcano.github.io/Uniandes/): View projects associated with Uniandes.
- [WCS Camera Trap](https://dlizcano.github.io/WCS-CameraTrap/): Information and resources for WCS camera trap initiatives.
- [Introduction to Occupancy Book](https://dlizcano.github.io/IntroOccuBook/): Learn the fundamentals of occupancy modeling.
- [Multi-Season Occupancy Models](https://dlizcano.github.io/occu_multi_season/): Explore resources for multi-season occupancy modeling.
- [Introduction to Spatial R (Light)](https://dlizcano.github.io/Intro_R_espacial_light/): Learn basic spatial data analysis in R.
- [Spatial Data Lite](https://dlizcano.github.io/spatialdata_lite/): Introduction to handling spatial data in R.
- [Introduction to R](https://dlizcano.github.io/IntroR/): Learn the basics of R programming for data analysis.
- [Occupancy Modeling Presentations](https://dlizcano.github.io/IntroOccuPresent/): View presentations on occupancy modeling in R.
- [Animal Activity Patterns](https://dlizcano.github.io/activity/): Explore data and analysis of animal activity.
- [Camera Trap Index](https://dlizcano.github.io/cameratrap/index.html): Main page for camera trap related content.
- [Occupancy Book Index](https://dlizcano.github.io/occu_book/index.html): Index for the occupancy modeling book.
- [Uniandes Projects Index](https://dlizcano.github.io/Uniandes/index.html): Index for projects related to Uniandes.
- [WCS Camera Trap Index](https://dlizcano.github.io/WCS-CameraTrap/index.html): Index for WCS Camera Trap resources.
- [Intro Occupancy Book Index](https://dlizcano.github.io/IntroOccuBook/index.html): Index for the introductory occupancy book.
- [Multi-Season Occupancy Index](https://dlizcano.github.io/occu_multi_season/index.html): Index for multi-season occupancy modeling content.
- [Intro Spatial R Light Index](https://dlizcano.github.io/Intro_R_espacial_light/index.html): Index for the introductory spatial R course.
- [Spatial Data Lite Index](https://dlizcano.github.io/spatialdata_lite/index.html): Index for the spatial data lite content.
- [Introduction to R Index](https://dlizcano.github.io/IntroR/index.html): Index for the Introduction to R course.
- [Occupancy Presentations Index](https://dlizcano.github.io/IntroOccuPresent/index.html): Index for occupancy modeling presentations.
- [Animal Activity Index](https://dlizcano.github.io/activity/index.html): Index for animal activity analysis.

## Tutorials and Guides

- [Tutorials](https://dlizcano.github.io/tutorials/): Find tutorials on various ecological data analysis topics.
- [Biodiversity Monitoring Course (Spanish)](https://dlizcano.github.io/spanish/Biodiversity-monitoring_course/): Learn about biodiversity monitoring techniques in Spanish.
- [MammalCol on CRAN](https://dlizcano.github.io/english/mammalcol-is-on-CRAN/): Learn how to use the MammalCol package from CRAN.
- [Graphing BirdNET GO Sound Data](https://dlizcano.github.io/english/Graph-of-soundlevel-data-from-BirdNET-GO/): Learn to graph sound level data from BirdNET GO.
- [Soundlevel Data from BirdNET GO](https://dlizcano.github.io/english/Soundlevel-data-from-BirdNET-GO/): Understand sound level data collected with BirdNET GO.
- [Animating Deforestation Data](https://dlizcano.github.io/english/Animating-Deforestation/): Learn to animate deforestation data using R.
- [Monitoring Birds with BirdNET (Spanish)](https://dlizcano.github.io/spanish/Monitoreando-aves-con-Birdnet/): Guide to monitoring birds using BirdNET in Spanish.
- [Starting a Camera Trap Blog](https://dlizcano.github.io/english/Starting-a-camera-trap-blog/): Tips for starting a blog focused on camera trapping.
- [Ten Years on GitHub](https://dlizcano.github.io/english/Ten-years-in-github/): Reflections on a decade of using GitHub for projects.
- [2023 Summary (Spanish)](https://dlizcano.github.io/spanish/Resumen-2023/): Review of activities and achievements in 2023 (Spanish).
